subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-03-18
subcodes.first_line: Although in this Cause there are no nuns and nunneries, yet truly some of these nuns serve most faithfully the world of humanity.
subcodes.subjects: @monasticism; asceticism, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
